overview: Enterprise goods transportation management platform with protected staff dashboard, anonymous customer order submission with tracking codes, and GPS-based live shipment tracking with static map display.
features: Staff login with role-based access (admin, dispatcher, driver)
Customer order submission with unique tracking codes
Shipment creation, assignment, and status management
GPS tracking via browser geolocation + static map
Shipment timeline with notes and status history
Public customer tracking page (no login required)
Responsive layout for desktop and mobile
